svg.text: Task: validate an RFC 5321 email address
Same input contract: (email: string) → boolean. Same correctness on the oracle suite.
"AI's first instinct: import validator from 'validator'. What that drags in:"
86 different is* validators in the same default object · only isEmail is called
URL parsers, regex compilers, locale data, format normalizers…
single content-addressed unit · 6 functions, every one in the contract
98.0% smaller bundle · 98.8% fewer reachable functions · 113× fewer files · same oracle pass rate
Source: bench/B10-import-replacement/results-win32-2026-05-17.json · validator surface counted from npm install validator (230 files / 587 fns / 86 is* validators)
